name: GhostNPC Buddy
author: t-Ghost-t
description: GhostBuddy adds a follower system where your Pokémon feel like real companions.
- Smooth overworld map transitions with minimal visual jitter or glitches.
- An auto-color matching tool to ensure your pet's hue perfectly fits its sprite.
- Reactive AI that lets your pets roam around when you're resting.
